options.label: A
options.text: Because the Sun heats the air

options.label: B
options.text: Because air particles collide with everything on Earth's surface

options.label: C
options.text: Because water evaporates from the oceans

explanation: Atmospheric pressure is caused by the weight of all the air above us and the collisions of air particles with everything on Earth's surface. These trillions of collisions create the pressure we experience.
